programme.title: E1 - Epic Rescues & Weasel's Fails!
programme.desc: Get ready for epic rescues & Mr. Weasel's hilarious fails! The chaos begins when Weasel fills Max the Monster Truck's tires with helium, causing him to float away & forcing Gecko to perform a sky-high rescue! Then, Weasel's plan to give Molly extra bouncy springs goes wrong, & Gecko has to help her stop bouncing. The rescues continue when Weasel's new electro-magnet sucks up Baby Truck & the Mechanicals, & Gecko has to save the day!

programme.title: E1 - When Baby Daniel Causes Total Mayhem!
programme.desc: Get ready for some total mayhem caused by Baby Daniel! The chaos begins when Daniel finds the remote to control Arpo, turning the robot babysitter into everything from an elephant to a bird! Then, Arpo is tasked with cleaning the kitchen, but Daniel just wants to play, making an even bigger mess. From getting covered in mud to being extra noisy while Daddy is trying to sleep, Baby Daniel keeps Arpo on his toes in this fun-filled, chaotic adventure!

programme.title: E3 - Learning, Growing & Having Fun!
programme.desc: Buster is learning, growing & having fun! First, he gets covered in mud & needs to get clean, but he's frightened by the big, noisy carwash! He has to work up the courage to try it himself. Then, after eating too many sweets, Buster gets a sore tooth & Amber the Ambulance teaches him the importance of keeping his teeth clean. In a race against Terry Tractor, Buster also learns that slow & steady can sometimes win the race!

programme.title: E3 - Let's All Play Together with JJ!
programme.desc: Let's all play together with JJ! In this inspiring adventure, JJ & his classmates learn to never give up & help each other when they face an obstacle, spreading kindness with a simple wave. Then, JJ plays a fun game of 'follow the leader' with his dad! The learning continues as Ms. Appleberry teaches the class that it's okay to make mistakes. Plus, JJ's Mom teaches the kids how to properly say hello to a new pet!

programme.title: E1 - A Day of Food, Play & Learning!
programme.desc: Join the kids for a day of food, play & learning! First, Grandma Panda bakes some cupcakes while Mia & Bari role-play as bakers in their own pretend kitchen & play a game of pat-a-cake. Then, it's time for a teddy bear's picnic with a whole variety of different tasty treats! The learning continues as Daddy & Twinkle show Max how to say hello with a wave before going into town to wave hello to all their friends. It's a fun-filled, yummy day!

programme.title: My Holy Car - An Obsession Made In Germany - Part 2
programme.desc: More than 140 years after its invention, the car remains a source of fascination for many people. In Germany, for example, there are more vehicles on the road than ever before. For some, the car is a cult object. But it also deeply polarizing.

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: Considering A Solo Trip? Eva Zu Beck And DW Reporters Share Their Experienc
programme.desc: Solo travel is on the rise - but what does it really take to explore the world on your own, especially as a woman? In this episode, global explorer Eva zu Beck and DW Travel hosts share their personal insights and experiences from years of solo travel. Be sure to watch until the end, when Eva zu Beck, Hanna Hummel, Sarah Hucal, Aisha Sharipzhan and Goenna Ketels reveal their most helpful tips.

Be sure to watch until the end, when Eva zu Beck, Hanna Hummel, Sarah Hucal, Aisha Sharipzhan and Goenna Ketels reveal their most helpful tips.

programme.title: Can't Walk But I Can Fly
programme.desc: 23-year-old Luisa Rizzo feels most at home when piloting a drone - either as a cinematographer, or as one of the foremost pilots in the fast-growing sport of drone racing. Being born with spinal muscular atrophy means Luisa spends much of her time in a wheelchair, and racing has given her a sense of freedom and purpose. Can she continue her sporting success at the highly competitive World Cup?

programme.title: E302 - The Rainbow
programme.desc: Peppa and her family spot a rainbow when they go for a drive.

programme.title: E113 - Stuck On You
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope.

programme.title: E907 - The Dragon Game
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: E110 - The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E107 - The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: E737 - Long Train Journey
programme.desc: Daddy Pig receives a letter saying he must go away on business to test some very important concrete!

programme.title: E212 - Pups Save The Parrot / Pups Save The Queen Bee
programme.desc: The PAW Patrol heads to the jungle to help their friend Carlos find his lost parrot, Mateo! // When the PAW Patrol discovers a beehive in Cap'n Turbot's lighthouse, Ryder and the pups must work together to find the bees a new home.

programme.title: E113 - Stuck On You
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E201 - Explorer
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.

programme.title: E811 - The Marble Run
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Rebecca and Richard Rabbit have so much fun playing with their marble run. When Daddy Pig joins in, the marble run gets much bigger!

programme.title: E907 - The Dragon Game
programme.desc: Blaze, AJ, Crusher, and Pickle are magically transported into an enchanted board game called The Dragon Game! Now, the four friends must overcome the game's dragon-themed challenges to win!

programme.title: E103 - Parents
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: E412 - Snow Day Showdown
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Axle City, and every truck in town is lining up for a delicious winter warm-up: hot chocolate! But when Crusher tries to take all the hot chocolate for himself, Blaze is in hot pursuit to get it back!

programme.title: E113 - Stuck On You
programme.desc: Daisy worries she and Winston will be stuck together forever when they get tangled in Winston's jump rope.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E611 - Firefighters To The Rescue!
programme.desc: When three fire emergencies break out across Axle City, it's up to Blaze to put 'em out - and to do it, he'll transform into the most epic fire rescue vehicles we've ever seen!

programme.title: E407 - The Secret Pyramid / Abuela Adventure Day
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Mami search for magical gems and a secret pyramid with their new friend, Patli! // Dora and friends save their Abuelas in time to celebrate Abuela Adventure Day!

programme.title: E314 - Princess Peppa
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa Pig come for a dinner party with Mummy and Daddy Pig. Peppa and George are too tired to go to bed, until they are told a story.

programme.title: E745 - Doctors
programme.desc: When Tiddles the Tortoise gets stuck in a tree, Pedro Pony has trouble trying to rescue him!

programme.title: E748 - Super Potato
programme.desc: Mr. Potato has come to visit the playgroup and he's brought along his superhero friend, Super Potato!

programme.title: E407 - Robots To The Rescue
programme.desc: When three big emergencies turn out to be too much for one truck alone, Blaze turns himself and his friends into super strong robots to save Axle City from a runaway train, an overflowing glue factory, and an erupting volcano!

programme.title: E614 - Pups Save A Mud Monster
programme.desc: Snowboarders on Jake's Mountain are stuck on a broken chair lift while a monster is on the loose!

programme.title: E209 - One Last For The Road / The Little Critters
programme.desc: The Barbababies love bedtime stories, except if they are always the same... // Barbabelle had a restless night because of all the insects!

programme.title: E110 - The Crew Builds A Pig Barn / The Crew Builds A Giant Runway
programme.desc: A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party? // Motor's super special birthday present gets delayed when the pups realize Builder Cove's airport needs a bigger runway.

programme.title: E107 - The Rainforest Ritmo / The Magic Nut
programme.desc: Isa's throwing a party where everyone will be dancing the Rainforest Ritmo. Boots has to learn the dance before they get there! // Dora leads everyone into the Tricky Trappy Forest to recover Tico's magic nut that can turn into your favorite food.

programme.title: E811 - The Marble Run
programme.desc: Peppa, George, Rebecca and Richard Rabbit have so much fun playing with their marble run. When Daddy Pig joins in, the marble run gets much bigger!

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E109 - Toy / Astrofools / Mole
programme.desc: Tim does all he can to get the new DinoStar toy. // It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop. // Tim and Dad have to catch a troublesome mole.

programme.title: E115 - The Fuchsia Ocean / Zero Waste
programme.desc: Chemical sprays are making the countryside rosy! The Barbapapas' build an aviary to protect sick birds. // When they see a beach covered with rubbish, the Barbapapa family decides to clean the beach and use the trash to make a miniature golf course.

programme.title: E109 - Astrofools
programme.desc: It's a day for practical jokes, but Tim doesn't know when to stop.

programme.title: E222 - I'm Not A Barbababy Anymore / Roboxman
programme.desc: No! It's over! Barbidur is no longer a baby, he's a big boy now! // The barbababies are going to the hypermarket for the first time.

programme.title: E412 - Snow Day Showdown
programme.desc: It's a snowy day in Axle City, and every truck in town is lining up for a delicious winter warm-up: hot chocolate! But when Crusher tries to take all the hot chocolate for himself, Blaze is in hot pursuit to get it back!

programme.title: E16 - The Big Sleepover
programme.desc: The little girl and her feathery friend have a sleepover with some friends, but struggle to get to nod off.

programme.title: E29 - Mermaid
programme.desc: Fifi asks Stanley to help them find a Mermaid so they can take its picture for school. They explore the ocean floor in their search where they encounter lots of ocean creatures.

programme.title: E28 - Sophie Can Do
programme.desc: Stanley asks Sophie to help out with a few of his jobs whilst she waits for her dino costume to dry. The pair go about town fixing everyone's problems in fun and imaginative ways.

programme.title: E13 - I Actually Gave Santa A High Five
programme.desc: The talking animals talk about everything they love about Easter, Halloween, and Christmas!

programme.title: E38 - Cubby
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo build a very special cubby for their stuffed toy Kimjim.

programme.title: E39 - Exercise
programme.desc: Dad thinks he needs to do some exercise, but Bingo pretends to be Boss Bluey's new employee in the middle of Dad's backyard workout.

programme.title: E40 - Relax
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo would rather explore their holiday hotel room than relax on the beach.

programme.title: E43 - The Looking After Badge
programme.desc: Outside the clubhouse a large crowd has gathered around a hot air balloon with whisperings that someone is going on an adventure!

programme.title: E9 - Ladybird's Gameshow
programme.desc: Spot the odd one out or guess who lives here. A great memory tip from Duggee, an edition of The Agony and Eggstacy, and how to draw Enid - down to her last whisker.

programme.title: E42 - Broccoli Alone
programme.desc: Supertato is out chasing a milkshake robot and leaves Broccoli in charge of Tato Tower. Evil Pea tries to take over the tower, but Broccoli puts on a great defence.

programme.title: E85 - I Spy
programme.desc: The voice trumpet leads a game of 'I Spy' where the Teletubbies have to spot different colours - purple, green, yellow and red. What or who can they spot with those colours?

programme.title: E9 - Memory Games
programme.desc: Messy goes to Okido and learns how to 'jog' his memory,

programme.title: E41 - Mums And Dads
programme.desc: When Indy and Rusty play Mums and Dads, they can't agree on who should go to work, so they part company. Indy has a hard time finding a babysitter, while Bluey makes Rusty her baby.

programme.title: E44 - Handstand
programme.desc: At a party, Bingo is desperate to show off her handstand skills, while Nanna can't find a way to make herself useful. They're both feeling a bit lost, until they find each other.

programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: E23
programme.desc: This drama features the women of three generations and people around them. Mari grows up as a good teacher of this generation where there is no true mentor. Hyeonsuk, who has been a troublemaker, realizes the love and support of her family. Kang Sunok regards herself as unlucky, but later on realizes how happy she has been. How can you hold up when your life gets tough? You will figure it out by holding up day by day, just like these women in the drama.

programme.title: E3 - Zac Efron
programme.desc: World-renowned survivalist Bear Grylls leads Zac Efron (Neighbors (2014)) on a non-stop extreme survival journey into the Northeast Appalachian mountain range wilderness. With Bear's help, Zac challenges himself physically, as well as mentally, on an awe-inspiring journey he could never have imagined.

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: Meet the mob of ‘street smart’ kangaroos moving into Australia’s capital city and the ecologists following their every move. Over one year we follow mob leader Black Spot and kangaroo mum Madge with her two young joeys – mischievous Sonny and tiny pouch bound Alice. After 15 years of drought, Canberra’s Eastern Grey Kangaroos know that the parks and gardens of Australia’s “bush capital” provide a reliable supply of the juicy grass but learning to be a street-smart urban ‘roo is tough with the kangaroos negotiating busy roads and avoiding cars and dogs. Inevitably their incursion into human habitat causes problems – damage to property and collisions with cars. It’s costing millions and thousands of animals are killed each year. The farmers complain that the ‘roos are eroding farmland and damaging their fences. The ACT Government holds an annual kangaroo cull to reduce animal numbers to “sustainable levels”. Confrontations make international news as the situation arouses passions and pol

programme.title: E7 - Aboriginal Voices
programme.desc: Leaders and representatives of Aboriginal communities show Zac and Darin how Indigenous cultures live to protect and preserve the land.

programme.title: E1 - The Big Deal
programme.desc: Claudia’s season starts off with a bang when she receives a $250,000 jade order, but things quickly turn sour when her crew questions if they have a big enough boulder to complete the sale.

programme.title: E2 - The Last Laugh
programme.desc: After years of getting the raw end of the deal with Scrappy Larry, Robin pulls a prank on his old buddy, but the fun and games end when Claudia’s buyer makes an unexpected request.

programme.title: E3 - Down to the Wire
programme.desc: Under pressure to meet their buyer’s tight deadline, Robin and Josh clash when they run into endless problems setting up the wire saw.

programme.title: E3 - Girona
programme.desc: Jack learns how to cook the old-fashioned, classic British jellied eels dish. Although it was once an extremely popular meal in Britain, will the Spanish locals like it too?

programme.title: E4 - Malmo
programme.desc: Jack is in the vegetarian capital of Northern Europe, Malmo, Sweden. Here, he shares his version of the Welsh Rarebit toastie and a Michelin star chef adds a Nordic twist.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met... A Daffodil
programme.desc: Henry meets a friendly Daffodil. He is getting ready to welcome some new plants to the garden when they arrive a day early.

programme.title: Space for All
programme.desc: Is space exploration for everyone? It hasn't always been, but it certainly can be. From individuals who are deaf, to the developing world, host Emily Calandrelli highlights some hidden figures in this industry and shows how there's space...for all explorers.

programme.title: Space Rescues
programme.desc: Sending humans into space is always risky. Host Emily Calandrelli looks at a couple close calls on missions that have had to abort after launch, and examines steps being taken by NASA to prepare for the worst.

programme.title: Prove It!
programme.desc: Eric juggles three different kinds of balls: a baseball, a tennis ball, and a bouncy rubber ball. Then he does a scientific experiment to see which one can bounce the highest.

programme.title: ColourXplosion
programme.desc: Eric learns that if you want to create different paint colours, all you have to do is mix your paints. As long as you have the primary colours – red, blue, and yellow – you can create lots of new shades.

programme.title: Vanishing Into the Sunset
programme.desc: Have you noticed that some things look further away than others on a flat surface, almost as if they were about to disappear? In this episode we introduce you to the concept of 'perspective', often used by painters to provide depth to objects.

programme.title: Time to Say Goodbye
programme.desc: It's the last day at vet school for the Junior Vets. They faced their fears, overcame anxieties, and, most importantly, they helped all sorts of animals, pets, and critters.

programme.title: Well Buttered
programme.desc: Eric uses marbles to make butter out of cream. He learns how butter used to be made and how it is made today.

programme.title: Battle Ground
programme.desc: The Icicles are in Austria for the Synchro World Championships. They have to pull out a show-stopping performance to beat their rivals. Josh and Kloe get into the spirit of Christmas, and disaster strikes for Charlie in his speed skating debut.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Trip to Bhutan
programme.desc: Zoe and Milo wish each other a happy New Year when Alim arrives and wishes them a happy birthday. Confused, they follow him to Bhutan, where their friend Dorji explains that in this Himalayan country, everyone turns a year older on New Year's Day.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle
programme.desc: Federica, the turtle, has arrived from Italy after a run-in with a container ship. Loro Parque has offered to be her ‘forever home', but how will she go sharing her new digs with others? Esmeralda, the iguana, has a lumpy belly and Jorge, the vet, is worried.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: The Mystery of the Ghostly Go Kart
programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: Day of the Vlog
programme.desc: Gavin thinks that he could get rich and famous by filming a vlog about being the Art Ninja's annoying best friend. Ricky wants in, but not before creating a graffiti pinboard and a camera print inspired by Andy Warhol.

programme.title: Attacking Castles
programme.desc: For ‘noble knight' Sir Howler, taking Lord Roach's fortress by storm is a real conundrum! But our formidable war leader's inventiveness comes in very useful! All the attack techniques in the book are deployed to invade his most loyal enemy's abode.

programme.title: Battle Ground
programme.desc: The Icicles are in Austria for the Synchro World Championships. They have to pull out a show-stopping performance to beat their rivals. Josh and Kloe get into the spirit of Christmas, and disaster strikes for Charlie in his speed skating debut.

programme.title: No Time to Waste
programme.desc: Shiloh, the German Shepherd, has started limping, and Kylee wants to find out why. Xavier rushes in with a lifeless Lorikeet. Can he and vet Karmen revive it?

programme.title: Math is Everywhere
programme.desc: This episode explores mathematical patterns in nature, such as the tessellating hexagonal units of a honeycomb, the bilateral symmetry of a leaf, and the radial symmetry of a snowflake and spider web. Math really is everywhere!

programme.title: The Magic Number
programme.desc: In 1949, the mathematician D. R. Kaprekar from India came up with the ‘Kaprekar's operation'. Following three fixed steps, the outcome of this operation is always 6174. How is that possible? We'll find out in this exciting episode.

programme.title: Roger Has A Problem
programme.desc: In today's episode, Roger, the dog, has eaten a tennis ball. Will he feel bouncier after an operation to remove it? Also, a pony has a hurt hoof, and there is a pig who thinks he's a dog! And Johnny and Inel find out how to help a constipated guinea pig.

programme.title: Oops, I Forted!
programme.desc: Do you want to know how you can build a really big fort? In this episode Eric reveals an exciting trick. The ingredients? A lot of cushions and the mathematical 'perimeter'. So gather your pillows and get ready for some fort action!

programme.title: Time After Time
programme.desc: When Darwin gets lost in his work, Newts comes up with a plan to help him keep track of time.

programme.title: Federica the Turtle

programme.desc: When Kevin's new radio-controlled model car starts acting like it has a bad-tempered mind of its own, he becomes convinced that it is haunted and asks Addison to help.

programme.title: Les Enfants De Buchenwald, Une Action Humanitaire Suisse
programme.desc: After the German capitulation in 1945, Switzerland, accused of having prolonged its economic relations with the Nazi regime, attempted to restore its reputation by welcoming two thousand young survivors of the concentration camps. An action that did not unfold as planned, in a context marked by antisemitism. Testimonies.

programme.title: E79 - The Traitor/The Advice/The Signal/The Girlfriend/The Parasite
programme.desc: Gumball has, through gritted teeth, prepared a special dinner for Alan, to apologise for the way he has treated him in the past. When Alan cancels, Gumball is overjoyed until a post on Elmore Plus reveals Alan lied about his Mum being sick, and is having a day of fun with his family instead. Gumball tracks down the traitor to give him a piece of his mind, but when he finds out his Mum really is sick he has to find a way to make it up to him.

programme.title: I&ai
programme.desc: A fun program that explores generative AI through animation and live action. In the animated segments, a 10‑year‑old boy and girl team up with a robot to ask simple questions like “How can AI talk?” and “Does it make mistakes?” In the explanation corner, familiar examples-such as assembling a hamburger or a parrot learning human words-clarify how AI works and highlight not only its convenience but also its risks.

programme.title: Eye On Africa[Live]
programme.desc: Join Georja Calvin-Smith for all the news from Africa and the Maghreb, together with France 24's correspondents and guests of the show. Eye on Africa is on every week day twice a day. Have a look at African life and find out what is going on there in the sphere of politics, health care, business. Get to know how global affairs influence its top events and be the first to experience its colorful exotic culture.

programme.title: The Whistleblower
programme.desc: An earthquake of 6.6 magnitude strikes Malawi in southeast Africa. Eco Energy Technology, an Australian energy conglomerate with business in the region, sends its rescue team for emergency response. Meanwhile, in an exclusive resort in Australia, Chinese expatriate Mark (Lei Jiayin) runs into his ex-lover Wen (Tang Wei), now married to the chairman of Han Coal Group. Their old feelings rush back but soon he is dragged into something bigger with Wen... and turn into a night of passion, before Wen flies off to China in the morning. That afternoon, Mark is devastated to learn that the plane Wen took has crashed, with no sign of survivors. Two weeks have passed. Mark is trying to leave the past behind, when a mysterious call puts him in limbo. Mark discovers Wen cheats death after failing to catch the flight. Before figuring out the next step, they are tracked down by killers wherever they flee. Someone obviously wants her dead for good. Hopelessly outpowered, Mark pledges to pro

programme.title: E1474
programme.desc: The Great Era gives a wide selection of Phoenix outstanding documentaries, covering different topics and issues in question, and capturing life as it is.

programme.title: E165
programme.desc: “We Are One” uses a documentary shooting method, from the perspective of people, animals, and nature living in harmony, tells a touching story of cross-species, highlighting the noble sentiments of purity and kindness. As the sons of the earth, we are in harmony with nature, and all things coexist with love. From January 21, 2023, Phoenix Chinese Channel will launch a weekly documentary program of human and animals “We Are One” with a total duration of 26 minutes.

programme.desc: Gifted chef Mannat strives for success, unaware her ruthless boss, Aishwarya, is her estranged birth mother, creating a complex and emotional workplace dynamic.

programme.desc: Noyontara talks to ghosts and is mocked for it. Her world flips after marrying Surjo, a man who trusts only science, leading to spooky twists and emotional surprises.

programme.title: E10 - Baker's Man
programme.desc: After NCIS learns that the owner of Parker's favorite bakery is being blackmailed, they hatch a plan to save her.

programme.title: E1 - Let The Games Begin!
programme.desc: Ten home bakers enter the kitchen and are tasked with creating a chocolate Tic Tac Toe board. In the Elimination Challenge, the bakers set a scrumptious scene by delivering a cake diorama.

programme.title: E5 - World Of Flavor
programme.desc: With the immunity off the table, the top six bakers pair up to build a magnificent meringue tower; after receiving a postcard from home, the bakers embark on a sweet journey and deliver a dessert showcasing an international ingredient.

programme.title: E7 - Sweet Suspensions
programme.desc: The final four use their chocolate and confectionary skills to create a delectable trifle terrarium; with one elimination challenge before the finale, the bakers must create a three-tiered suspended cake.

programme.title: E8 - A Tale Of Three Bakers
programme.desc: The home bakers are tasked with telling their baking story through four delectable dessert chapters; one baker walks away with the $50,000 grand prize and the title of Great Chocolate Showdown Champion.

programme.desc: The home bakers are tasked with telling their baking story through four delectable dessert chapters; one baker walks away with the $50,000 grand prize and the title of Great Chocolate Showdown Champion.

programme.title: E1 - Let The Games Begin!
programme.desc: Ten home bakers enter the kitchen and are tasked with creating a chocolate Tic Tac Toe board. In the Elimination Challenge, the bakers set a scrumptious scene by delivering a cake diorama.

programme.title: E5 - World Of Flavor
programme.desc: With the immunity off the table, the top six bakers pair up to build a magnificent meringue tower; after receiving a postcard from home, the bakers embark on a sweet journey and deliver a dessert showcasing an international ingredient.

programme.title: E7 - Sweet Suspensions
programme.desc: The final four use their chocolate and confectionary skills to create a delectable trifle terrarium; with one elimination challenge before the finale, the bakers must create a three-tiered suspended cake.

programme.title: Hocus Pocus
programme.desc: In a touring opera group, the domineering star is hated by all. The lesser actors try to give him a bad time by posing as ghosts. Their antics attract the attention of a real ghost who comes to make fun of them. Stage old hand Seng soon discovers the mischievous ghost met a violent death. Seng promises to find his remains and bury him. Unwittingly, Seng buries the wrong bones which belong to the Vicious Ghost. The Vicious Ghost comes and leaves a trail of violence...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Manfred Wong (Part2)
programme.desc: Since veteran filmmaker Manfred Wong joined the film industry since 1970s and worked for numerous Hong Kong companies at the position from scriptwriter, Head of Promotions to film producer, he has now been the best guide bringing us to travel through a sense of nostalgia for the old days of Hong Kong cinema. In this programme, he tells refinedly that there was a strife between Cantonese and Mandarin movies in 50s and 60s while fierce competitions amongst different film production companies over decades; also how various film companies manifested in the 90s golden era of Hong Kong movies.

programme.title: Fruit Punch
programme.desc: Five young men threw themselves with heart and soul into the work force. They have different approaches and different life styles. Ah Kit is the hardworking investment broker. He is so busy making money. Ah Chi is a postman believing in fung shui. Ah Hark is an apprentice in his family jewelry shop and Ah Wai failed in public exam. Ah Ming is the most unconventional of the five. Working in a Japanese restaurant. The five start a laundry shop which soon folds. Next, they try something new to save their business. Ah Ming leads a carefree life which dismays his girl, Yoko. Ah Hark's girlfriend Cat will move to Australia and leave him soon. Ah Ming and Ah Hark are going to lose their girlfriends. The five new generation are going their own ways...

programme.title: Game Of Death
programme.desc: When Billy refuses to be intimidated by henchman Steiner, Dr. Land orders his assassination to serve as an example to others. Stick sneaks onto the set of Billy's new film....

programme.title: The Diary Of A Big Man
programme.desc: In this delightful screwball comedy, Chow Yun Fat plays a stock broker who met 2 women of his dream on the same night - boutique owner Joey (Joey Wang) and air stewardess Sally (Sally Yeh). Unable to say no to either one, he ended up marrying them both, one in New York and the other in Paris. When the wives befriended each other, he solicited the help from his buddy Hung (Waise Lee) to get him out of each tight spot.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam: the Journey's End
programme.desc: The Mekong Delta is one of the largest on Earth. Formed over the last 8000 years, it fans out and discharges into the South China Sea via nine channels. These channels split and shape the coastline, creating unique habitats for a variety of animals.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E10 - Vietnam: the Journey's End
programme.desc: The Mekong Delta is one of the largest on Earth. Formed over the last 8000 years, it fans out and discharges into the South China Sea via nine channels. These channels split and shape the coastline, creating unique habitats for a variety of animals.

programme.title: E5 - A Pangolin's Plight
programme.desc: Feel heartbreak when Dr. Amanda’s team loses a pangolin abused by wildlife traffickers, but cheer when another is released post-rehab. Check on a trio of hedgehogs and tag along as the center’s baboons and nyala antelopes get a change of scenery.

programme.title: E6 - Crocodile Capers
programme.desc: Strap in for Dr. Amanda’s risky attempt to collar a wild roan antelope. Later, chase down blue monkey Indigo while unrest ensues among the vervets. Examine an eagle owl with bumblefoot and say adieu to Sheila the croc, who’s headed back to the wild.

programme.title: E1 - Earth
programme.desc: Travel to the ends of the Earth, where a drama is unfolding in real time. Meet animals, from tiny butterflies to huge humpback whales, that are acting as sentinels, adapting their behaviour, and helping us unlock the riddles of our changing planet.

programme.title: E3 - Macro Mozambique
programme.desc: The coast of Mozambique is home to giants, like humpbacks and whale sharks, but the tiniest species play just as big of a role in the ecosystem. Meet the scientists who are working against the clock to protect coastal creatures big and small.

programme.title: E2 - Leaving Home
programme.desc: An ancient citadel once home to Sri Lanka’s kings has now been reclaimed by the jungle… and there’s a new dynasty in power. Monkeys.

programme.title: E3 - Trouble in Paradise
programme.desc: Tensions rise when drought overtakes an ancient Sri Lankan temple shared by tufted grey langurs, toque macaques, and purple-faced leaf monkeys. Witness the drama as the lower-ranking primates struggle to stay hydrated amid a mutinous plot.

programme.title: E4 - Mvula's Journey
programme.desc: Mvula is the youngest calf in the Madzi family. Temperatures are soaring. Lagoons and waterholes are drying up. This forces Mvula and his family to undertake a long and dangerous journey to the only remaining source of water: the Luangwa River.

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Follow four families of four different species - the resourceful Beach Troop, the warlike Desert Troop, the disciplined River Troop, and the peaceful Mountain Band - to find out why these primates are among the most successful animals in Africa.

programme.title: E2 - In Flight Meals
programme.desc: Go hunting with flyers who excel at making mid-air catches. Watch the metamorphosis of the acrobatic emperor dragonfly, admire the barn owl’s stealthy approach to prey, and catch a wandering salamander’s death-defying leap into the abyss.

programme.title: E4 - Flight Path
programme.desc: Plot a course for adventure as animals go on remarkable journeys through the skies. Navigate a wooden labyrinth with a speedy goshawk, join a sandgrouse’s trek to a distant watering hole, and see a murmuration of starlings mesmerize their nemesis.

Darna
programme.desc: Narda, a typical schoolgirl, learns that her mother is the protector of a mighty stone. She takes up the mantle and transforms into Darna, a superhero dedicated to battling evil forces on Earth.

programme.title: It's Showtime Live[Live]
programme.desc: The venue for Pinoys to strut and display their unique talents for all the world to see. Led by a powerhouse cast of popular celebrities - Vhong Navarro, Anne Curtis, Ogie Alcasid, Karylle, Jhong Hilario and Vice Ganda to name a few.

programme.title: Huli Mo, Huli Ko[Live]
programme.desc: Inspector Randy Tuazon leads a police raid that seemingly eradicates a satanic cult responsible for ritual murders. Years later, a series of mysterious killings suggests the cult has returned. With conventional methods failing, Randy reluctantly teams up with Paula, a quirky psychic whose visions begin to come true. Together, they unravel the truth behind the murders and attempt to stop the cult once and for all.

E104 - The Sweet Spot / A Tale of Two Tables
programme.desc: Lincoln devises a plan to get the best seat in the car for a long, family, road trip. // Lincoln tries to prove he's mature enough to have dinner at the adult table, leaving the kiddie table behind him.

programme.title: E409 - Love Birds
programme.desc: After Walt's failed attempt at romance, Charles, Cliff and Geo try to find their pal a love connection.

programme.title: E804 - InTODDnito
programme.desc: When Darcy's birthday party falls on the same day as one of Lisa's hero scientist's talks, Lisa sends TODD in her place to the party.

programme.title: E519 - Double-O Danger
programme.desc: Kid Danger and Captain Man attempt to capture Mob Boss Rob Moss by infiltrating his daughter's the sweet sixteen birthday party.

programme.title: E523 - A Tale of Two Pipers
programme.desc: Henry gets an unexpected visitor claiming to be from the future. When a boy-robot killing machine steps onto the scene, The Gang must find a way to save everyone from an apocalyptic future.

programme.title: E218 - Minyak Attack
programme.desc: When a tax loophole allows Dr. Minyak to buy the Man's Nest, Captain Man must stand his ground and live with his terrible new roommate while Danger Force tries to find a way to reverse the sale before they lose the Man's Nest for good.

programme.title: E211 - iGive Away a Car
programme.desc: The gang runs a contest on iCarly -- the prize is a new car courtesy of a local dealership. After Nevel wins, the kids discover that the dealership had no knowledge of the contest or the free car they were supposedly donating.

programme.title: E105 - Mar-Snoop / Canteen Carnage
programme.desc: On her quest to get her own Marsupilami, Bibi encounters a Jaguar which scares her enough to give up the hunt. // Marcel gets a job as the school chef after Jade causes the usual one to quit.

programme.title: E114 - Chess-a-pult / Smart & Smarter
programme.desc: Best and Bester turn themselves into chess pieces but have to abandon their game to save the sub from flooding. // Bester and Best are tasked with neutralising the enemy agent's ransomware for the Bettervale Investigation Bureau.

programme.title: E126 - Drive Hard
programme.desc: Captain Man and Danger Force are hired to deliver a big budget Hollywood movie to its premiere but the producer warns them that rival studios and internet trolls are out to steal the movie.

programme.title: E282 - Arbor Day Disarray / Ain't That the Tooth
programme.desc: Sandy gives her friends special saltwater trees, but they need more attention than she expected. // SpongeBob and Patrick mistake a burglar for the tooth fairy.

programme.title: E283 - Ma and Pa's Big Hurrah / Yellow Pavement
programme.desc: When SpongeBob's parents come to visit, their thirst for thrills comes as a big surprise. // You'll learn all you need to get your boating license in this educational driving film.

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 「青春守藝人」系列微紀錄片，穿越千年文脈，跋涉千山萬水，記錄傳統非遺的煥新故事，聆聽青春傳承的時代之音。一期一會，影像留住記憶，涵養精神文脈、厚植文化自信，向世界呈現絢爛多彩、賡續綿延的中華文明。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E10 - 「情歌」專場來襲
programme.desc: 首檔原創音樂創演節目，邀請了薛之謙、張靚穎、周深、單依純、黃子弘凡等歌手，同時更邀請小柯、方文山、黃國倫等樂壇前輩和眾多新生代原創音樂人加盟；由歌曲爭奪戰、首演舞台兩大核心環節組成，用一場歌手與歌曲的奇遇，為他們提供一個自由共創的舞台，打造華語樂壇新的高光時刻。

programme.title: E9 - 尤長靖學妹超穩高音驚艷全場
programme.desc: 突破傳統音樂綜藝節目模式，創新性地將舞台設立在郵輪上，從中國上海啟航，途經沖繩、越南、新加坡、馬來西亞，最終抵達香港；吸納數百名來自亞洲各國的00後新銳唱將，他們將在Jessie J、張靚穎、張信哲、尤長靖所組成的「新聲團」，及近百位亞洲各國音樂人的見證下，開啟一次巡迴亞洲的音樂競演！

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 圍繞「兼職女王」辛桐與四海集團繼承人聞裴安展開，辛桐為替閨蜜搞砸相親而錯誤結識聞裴安，聞裴安因家族逼婚僱傭辛桐假扮契約情侶，二人由此開啟與戀愛監察特工斗智斗勇的爆笑同居之旅。

programme.title: E9 - 盛大告白夜？
programme.desc: 以「尋找勢均力敵的參與者」為核心模式，通過團隊協作任務獲取生存物資，個人競技爭奪約會權，並設置淘汰機制與心動投票綁定規則；素人嘉賓們將逃離都市，直面愛情與生存的挑戰，在人群中尋找勢均力敵的彼此。

programme.title: E10

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 侯文詠原著小說改編，兩段糾結的情感，交織出一場關於「選擇」的情愛旅程。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 痴迷於數學的帥家默偶然發現金華縣一個歷史遺留問題，他在試圖糾正錯誤的過程中頻頻遇阻，並引發了各利益集團間的博弈。 軍戶出身的帥家默對數學極其感興趣，在一次拿各縣賦稅練習數學時，偶然發現有一筆科目叫作“人丁絲絹”稅收數目有疑點。經過查詢，帥家默知道有人偷換概念、移花接木，把原本各縣的賦稅轉嫁給了一個縣。帥家默瞭解此事後決定申訴，但在申訴過程中遇到重重困難，險些喪命，“人丁絲絹案”就此擱淺。後遇改革，舊案重提，經過帥家默和各方努力才讓真相大白於天下。

programme.title: E15 - Survive The Streets
programme.desc: John Nolan, the oldest rookie in the LAPD, has used his life experience, determination and sense of humor to keep up with rookies 20 years his junior. programme.title: US Squawk Box

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.
